title: White Vastu Tape 4 Inch
shortDescription: Premium white vastu tape for peace, purity, and positive energy correction.
description: The White Vastu Tape is designed according to vastu and color therapy principles to create peaceful, calm, and balanced surroundings. White symbolizes purity, clarity, and positivity, making this tape ideal for correcting vastu defects and improving harmonious energy flow. Suitable for homes, offices, meditation rooms, and spiritual spaces.
benefits: Easy to apply on floors and walls

title: Green Vastu Tape 4 Inch
shortDescription: Green vastu tape for growth, healing, prosperity, and balanced surroundings.
description: The Green Vastu Tape is associated with growth, freshness, healing, and prosperity. Designed for vastu remedies and color balancing applications, this tape helps create a soothing and stable environment. It is ideal for spaces related to health, study, financial growth, and emotional balance.

title: Red Vastu Tape 4 Inch
shortDescription: Powerful red vastu tape for activating energy, confidence, and strength.
description: The Red Vastu Tape represents strength, confidence, passion, and active energy. It is commonly used in vastu remedies to energize weak zones and stimulate positivity in living and working spaces. Perfect for areas requiring motivation, action, and enhanced vitality.

title: Blue Vastu Tape 4 Inch
shortDescription: Blue vastu tape for calmness, emotional stability, and peaceful energy flow.
description: The Blue Vastu Tape is inspired by the calming energy of the water element. It helps reduce stress, improve mental clarity, and create a peaceful atmosphere. Widely used in vastu and color therapy remedies, this tape supports emotional balance and smooth energy circulation.

title: Yellow Vastu Tape 4 Inch
shortDescription: Yellow vastu tape for positivity, wisdom, success, and energetic balance.
description: The Yellow Vastu Tape symbolizes positivity, intellect, confidence, and success. Designed for vastu and color therapy applications, it helps energize spaces with cheerful and uplifting vibrations. Ideal for study rooms, offices, and areas associated with creativity and learning.
benefits: Suitable for homes, offices, and study spaces
